component.name: NetTrace
component.summary: Professional DNS and Email Security Tools

description.p: NetTrace is a professional DNS lookup and email security validation tool. Perform global DNS checks, validate email authentication, run comprehensive security audits, and monitor blacklist status for your domains and mail servers.

ul.li: Global DNS record lookup from 30+ servers worldwide
Email security validation — SPF, DMARC, DKIM and more

screenshot.caption: DNS Checker — query DNS records from servers worldwide

description.p: Initial release of NetTrace Linux Desktop.
